message:
feat(conformance): add JSON subset matching, key-order-agnostic golden comparison, and updated extension fixtures

Conformance infrastructure (conformance/mod.rs, +253 lines):
- Upgrade details validation from null-check to recursive subset
  matching via match_json_subset() — expected keys must exist and
  match in actual, but actual may have additional keys
- Golden details comparison now uses key-order-canonicalized JSON
  for deterministic matching regardless of serialization order
- Proptest for subset matching monotonicity invariant

Tool conformance (tools_conformance.rs, +60 lines):
- New ls_listing_is_creation_order_invariant test verifying stable
  output ordering

Tool fixtures (ls_tool.json, +29 lines):
- Two new golden-file test cases for mixed entries and limit notices

Extension conformance:
- SCIP extension manifest updated from 0-tool stub to 6 real tools
  with proper schema definitions
- Fixture scenarios revised for realistic tool coverage
- Generated test file updated for new manifest shape

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
